response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of hands-on fullstack work, including recent TypeScript/Node.js product engineering and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic tooling) at Google, plus TypeScript/React/AWS/MongoDB experience at Meta. Deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks and courses) and Docker/Kubernetes exposure align well with the role. Gaps are mostly framework-specific — Nest.js, Vitest/Playwright, and Kotlin are not explicitly evidenced — and much of his earlier depth is in the niche D language rather than the JVM secondary stack.
strengths: Recent, directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js fullstack work plus hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience, a required skill that few candidates have
Strong testing and software-craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test runners and taught testing courses
Broad polyglot range (TS, Java, C++, PHP, Swift, D) with cloud, Docker, and Kubernetes deployment experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, and testing tools named in the JD (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are not directly evidenced on the resume
No Kotlin and only light, dated Java exposure for the secondary JVM backend stack
Significant career investment in the niche D language ecosystem, so ramp-up on the exact primary stack conventions may be needed

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js, Vitest/Playwright, and Kotlin specifics
